creator: alepulver@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

The following patch/request has been submitted to your port, as you are 
the maintainer please approve/reject (reply stating "I approve the 
patch" for example) or any other necessary actions.

Synopsis: [patch] emulators/sdlmame: add original site as mirror

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=132592

Regards,
Ale
